config.title: Stawka
config.script:
'QVE_* #include "50200" 'section_* #include "50222" #include "50101"
function fopen() #ifdef _ABAKUS if HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) then fopen = false exit function end if #endif
if not std_fopen() then fopen = false exit function end if
section_fopen THIS_FILE end function
function fclose section_fclose THIS_FILE end function
QVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_PRICE(CTRLID_WARTOSC,page_.root.curWartosc,page_.root.pJednostka,1)

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(SECID_MAIN,Podstawowe,FORM_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Kod stawki,1) QXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,10,strKod,1)
QXC_LABEL(Wartość,1) QXC_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,10,2,,curWartosc,1) QXC_LABEL(Jednostka,1) QXC_EDIT_REF(-1,SIZE_FOR_JEDNOSTKA,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5WALUTA,pJednostka,strSkrot,CRSR_DEFAULT,1)
QXC_LABEL(Data początkowa,1) QXC_DATE_FIELD(-1,dDataOd,1) QXC_LABEL(Data końcowa,1) QXC_DATE_FIELD(-1,dDataDo,1)
QXS_END_FLAT(FORM_SPAN)
QXS_MULTILINE(SECID_OPIS,CTRLID_OPIS,strOpis,Opis,FORM_SPAN)
QXF_END
